description: Phase 31: Federation & Open Protocols - Extend the existing @quant/federation package with CalDAV/CardDAV, IMAP adapters, developer platform (OAuth2 provider, API keys, webhooks, public APIs with rate limits), and documentation. Extend services/identity with OAuth2 provider routes.
steps: 1. Add CalDAV/CardDAV protocol support in packages/federation/src/caldav/ with: (a) caldav-server.ts implementing RFC 4791 PROPFIND/REPORT/PUT/DELETE for calendar events, (b) carddav-server.ts implementing RFC 6352 for contact vCards, (c) vcal-serializer.ts for iCalendar (RFC 5545) export/import, (d) vcard-serializer.ts for vCard 4.0 (RFC 6350) serialization. Include Zod schemas for validation.

2. Add IMAP/POP3 protocol adapter in packages/federation/src/mail-protocols/ with: (a) imap-adapter.ts implementing core IMAP commands (SELECT, FETCH, SEARCH, STORE, COPY) with mailbox mapping, (b) pop3-adapter.ts implementing USER/PASS/STAT/LIST/RETR/DELE, (c) smtp-relay.ts wrapping outbound SMTP with DKIM signing support. Reference services/smtp-inbound for patterns.

3. Add developer platform module in packages/federation/src/developer-platform/ with: (a) oauth2-provider.ts that implements full RFC 6749 authorization server (authorization code + PKCE flow, client credentials, token introspection RFC 7662, token revocation RFC 7009), (b) api-key-manager.ts for creating/rotating/revoking API keys with scopes, (c) webhook-manager.ts for registering webhook endpoints with HMAC signing and retry with exponential backoff, (d) rate-limit-config.ts defining per-scope rate limits for public API access, (e) developer-portal-types.ts with types for app registration, API docs generation.

4. Add tests for all new modules: packages/federation/src/caldav/__tests__/caldav-server.test.ts, packages/federation/src/caldav/__tests__/carddav-server.test.ts, packages/federation/src/mail-protocols/__tests__/imap-adapter.test.ts, packages/federation/src/developer-platform/__tests__/oauth2-provider.test.ts, packages/federation/src/developer-platform/__tests__/webhook-manager.test.ts. Follow the vitest patterns from existing tests (e.g. packages/federation/src/activitypub/actor.test.ts).
5. Update packages/federation/src/index.ts barrel to export all new modules.
6. Add docs/federation.md documenting all open protocols supported: ActivityPub, Matrix, CalDAV, CardDAV, IMAP, POP3, SMTP, OAuth2 Provider, Webhooks, Public APIs.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm test passes for @quant/federation with new tests covering CalDAV, CardDAV, IMAP, OAuth2 provider, and webhooks
All new modules are properly exported from the barrel index.ts
findings: All modules implemented and verified. Typecheck, test (98 tests pass), and build all succeed. Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged pre-commit hook.
